name: CLX - MGA Insurance Compliance Agent v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). The AI Compliance Agent — orchestrates a single compliance review per call. Caller passes review_type + the relevant entity id (kyc_id / suitability_id / disclosure_id / policy_application_id). Aggregates source data, asks Claude for a regulated-decision JSON, persists to compliance_reviews (vertical_id='insurance'), routes to compliance_officer queue if requires_human_review. All operations vertical-scoped. Compliance officer always retains override authority — see human_decision column.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'compliance_review_completed', client_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.client_id, advisor_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.advisor_id, policy_application_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.insert_row.policy_application_id, performed_by_user_id: null, performed_by_role: 'agent', event_data: { review_type: $('Parse Decision').item.json.review_type, entity_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.entity_id, ai_decision: $('Parse Decision').item.json.insert_row.ai_decision, ai_score: $('Parse Decision').item.json.insert_row.ai_score, flags_count: ($('Parse Decision').item.json.insert_row.ai_flags || []).length }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $('Parse Decision').item.json.client_id, action_id: null, cost_type: 'claude_token', units: $('Parse Decision').item.json.tokens || 0, unit_cost_cents: 0.0003, vendor: 'anthropic', recorded_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ (() => { const officers = $input.item.json; const arr = Array.isArray(officers) ? officers : (officers && officers.email ? [officers] : []); const to = (arr[0] && arr[0].email) || 'support@crystallux.org'; const ctx = $('Parse Decision').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, template: 'lead-meeting-booked', to: to, vars: { first_name: 'Compliance Officer', message: 'INSURANCE compliance review requires human attention. Type=' + ctx.review_type + ' entity_id=' + ctx.entity_id + ' AI decision=' + ctx.insert_row.ai_decision + ' score=' + ctx.insert_row.ai_score + '. Reasoning: ' + (ctx.insert_row.ai_reasoning || ''), landing_url: 'https://app.crystallux.org/compliance' } }); })() }}

nodes.name: Notify Compliance Officer
nodes.notes: Reuses lead-meeting-booked template as carrier (Phase 5b polish: dedicated compliance-review-required.html template). All compliance officers in auth_users WHERE user_role='compliance_officer' get notified — top 5 surfaced; if more, dashboard alert is the canonical inbox.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', review_type: $('Parse Decision').item.json.review_type, ai_decision: $('Parse Decision').item.json.insert_row.ai_decision, ai_score: $('Parse Decision').item.json.insert_row.ai_score, status: $('Parse Decision').item.json.insert_row.status, needs_human: $('Parse Decision').item.json.needs_human }) }}
